tasks.subject: [pulse-schedule-templates] [P1] Update onboarding imports and verify no regressions
tasks.description:
## Overview

After task 1.1 and 1.2 move `usePulsePresets` and `PresetCard`, the onboarding feature has shims in place. This task replaces the shims with direct imports from the new locations, updating `PulsePresetsStep` to use the new `PresetCard` API (`variant`, `checked`, `onCheckedChange`).

## Step 1 — Update PulsePresetsStep.tsx

In `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ui/PulsePresetsStep.tsx`:

1. Replace the import of `usePulsePresets` from the local model with the entity import:
```diff
- import { usePulsePresets } from '../model/use-pulse-presets';
+ import { usePulsePresets } from '@/layers/entities/pulse';
```

2. Replace the import of `PresetCard` from the local ui with the feature/pulse import:
```diff
- import { PresetCard } from './PresetCard';
+ import { PresetCard } from '@/layers/features/pulse';
```

3. Update the `PresetCard` usage inside the render: the old API was `enabled={bool} onToggle={fn}`, the new API is `variant="toggle" checked={bool} onCheckedChange={fn}`:
```diff
  {presets.map((preset) => (
    <PresetCard
      key={preset.id}
      preset={preset}
-     enabled={resolvedEnabled.has(preset.id)}
-     onToggle={() => handleToggle(preset.id)}
+     variant="toggle"
+     checked={resolvedEnabled.has(preset.id)}
+     onCheckedChange={() => handleToggle(preset.id)}
    />
  ))}
```

## Step 2 — Update OnboardingFlow.tsx

In `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ui/OnboardingFlow.tsx`, no import change is needed — it already imports `PulsePresetsStep` locally, not `usePulsePresets` directly. Verify this by checking the file: if `usePulsePresets` appears as a direct import in `OnboardingFlow.tsx`, update it to use `@/layers/entities/pulse`. Otherwise no change needed.

## Step 3 — Remove the shims

Now that direct imports have been updated:
- Delete `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/model/use-pulse-presets.ts` (the shim)
- Delete the re-export shim content from `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ui/PresetCard.tsx` (the file should be removed entirely — `PulsePresetsStep` no longer imports from it)

## Step 4 — Run onboarding tests

Run `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding` and verify all tests still pass. The existing `OnboardingFlow.test.tsx` mocks `PulsePresetsStep` entirely (with `vi.mock('../ui/PulsePresetsStep', ...)`), so it should pass unchanged. The existing `AgentCard.test.tsx` and `ProgressCard.test.tsx` do not touch `PresetCard` so they also pass unchanged.

## Acceptance Criteria

- `PulsePresetsStep.tsx` imports `usePulsePresets` from `@/layers/entities/pulse`
- `PulsePresetsStep.tsx` imports `PresetCard` from `@/layers/features/pulse`
- `PulsePresetsStep.tsx` renders `PresetCard` with `variant="toggle"` prop
- The shim files are removed (no dead re-export files remain)
- `pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding` passes
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
- `pnpm lint` passes
tasks.activeForm: Updating onboarding imports and removing shim files

tasks.subject: [pulse-schedule-templates] [P3] Run full test suite and verify onboarding regression tests
tasks.description:
## Overview

All feature work is complete. This task validates the entire change set: all new tests pass, all existing tests pass (especially onboarding regression tests), `typecheck` is clean, and `lint` is clean.

## Step 1 — Run all pulse-related tests

```bash
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/entities/pulse
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/pulse
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding
```

## Step 2 — Verify onboarding regression

The onboarding `PulsePresetsStep` still functions identically from the user's perspective — it shows all presets as toggle cards and creates schedules for selected ones. Only the import paths changed. Verify:

- `OnboardingFlow.test.tsx` still passes (it mocks `PulsePresetsStep` entirely, so it is unaffected by the prop API change)
- `PulsePresetsStep` renders `PresetCard` with `variant="toggle"` (not `enabled` / `onToggle`)
- No test expectations reference the old `enabled` or `onToggle` prop names

## Step 3 — Run type check and lint

```bash
pnpm typecheck
pnpm lint
```

Fix any remaining issues.

## Step 4 — Verify no FSD violations

Manually confirm there are no cross-feature model imports:
- `features/session-list` does NOT import from `features/pulse` model
- `features/pulse` does NOT import from `features/session-list` model
- `features/onboarding` does NOT import from `features/pulse` model (it imports from `features/pulse` UI for `PresetCard` — this is allowed by FSD's UI composition exception, and from `entities/pulse` for `usePulsePresets`)

## Step 5 — Run full client test suite

```bash
pnpm vitest run apps/client
```

All tests must pass.

## Acceptance Criteria

- All new tests from tasks 1.1–3.2 pass
- All existing tests in `features/onboarding`, `features/pulse`, `features/session-list`, and `entities/pulse` pass
- `pnpm typecheck` exits 0
- `pnpm lint` exits 0
- No FSD layer violations detected by ESLint
- `usePulsePresetDialog` store state is always explicitly `clear()`-ed after consumption (verified by reading code in `CreateScheduleDialog`)
tasks.activeForm: Running full test suite and verifying onboarding regressions
